message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

box "Upstream" #White
participant "Producer" as UProducer <<C>>
participant "Adapter" as UAdapter <<C>>
participant "Tansport" as UTransport <<S>>
end box

box "Gateway" #White
participant "Adapter" as GAdapter <<C>>
participant "Consumer" as GConsumer <<C>>
box "JobExecution" #LightCyan
participant "GatewayJobHandler" as GatewayJobHandler <<C>>
end box
participant "Gateway" as GGateway <<C>>
participant "Producer" as GProducer <<C>>
participant "Adapter" as GAdapter2 <<C>>
end box

box "Downstream" #White
participant "Tansport" as DTransport <<S>>
participant "Adapter" as DAdapter <<C>>
participant "Consumer" as DConsumer <<C>>
box "JobExecution" #LightCyan
participant "DownstreamJobHandler" as DownstreamJobHandler <<C>>
end box
participant "Lower Layer" as LowerLayer <<S>>
end box

UProducer -> UAdapter : publish(command)
UAdapter -> UTransport : publish(command)
UTransport -> GAdapter : execute(command)
UAdapter --> UProducer : resolves()
UProducer --> UProducer : resolves()
UProducer -> UAdapter : subscribe(handler)
UAdapter -> UTransport : subscribe("response")

GAdapter -> GConsumer : handler(command, done)
GConsumer -> GatewayJobHandler : subscribe("done")
GConsumer -> GatewayJobHandler : emit("command", GatewayJobHandler)

GatewayJobHandler -> GGateway : publish(command)
GGateway -> GProducer : publish(command)
GProducer -> GAdapter2 : publish(command)
GAdapter2 -> DTransport : execute(command)
GProducer --> GProducer : resolves()
GProducer -> GAdapter2 : subscribe(handler)
GAdapter2 -> DTransport : subscribe("response")

DTransport -> DAdapter : handler(command, done)
DAdapter -> DConsumer : subscribe("done")
DAdapter -> DConsumer : emit("command", GatewayJobHandler)

DConsumer -> DownstreamJobHandler : subscribe("done")
DConsumer -> DownstreamJobHandler : emit("command", GatewayJobHandler)
DownstreamJobHandler --> DownstreamJobHandler : done()
DownstreamJobHandler -> DConsumer : emit("done")
DConsumer -> DAdapter : done(response)

DAdapter -> DTransport : getDelay(command)\ndone(response)
DTransport -> GAdapter2 : emit("response", response)

GAdapter2 -> GProducer : handler("response")\nonTimeOut(getDelay())\nunsubscribe()
GProducer --> GAdapter2 : resolve(responses)

GatewayJobHandler -> GConsumer : done()
GConsumer -> GAdapter : emit("done")
GAdapter -> UTransport : done(response)

UTransport -> UAdapter : emit("response", response)
UAdapter -> UProducer : handler("response")
UAdapter -> UProducer : emit("response", response)
UProducer --> UProducer : handler("response")\nonTimeOut(getDelay())\nunsubscribe()

GConsumer -> GAdapter : getDelay(command)

@enduml
```
